title: Clear Column action for Every time period trigger
excerpt: It would be great if the “clear column” action could be used in conjunction with the “every time period” trigger. We make use of checkboxes on a weekly basis to assure tasks have been done and we need these checkboxes to…

posts.author: JDP_PK (Justin Du Preez)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if the “clear column” action could be used in conjunction with the “every time period” trigger. We make use of checkboxes on a weekly basis to assure tasks have been done and we need these checkboxes to be cleared over the weekend to start over again the following week

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
“Every time period” doesn’t work on multiple items. But I have a potential solution for you. The workflow you’re looking for can be achieved with “When date arrives” trigger:

  1. Create a date column in your board.

  2. Update it to then next weekend. You can do it in bulk:

    image929×641 47.6 KB

  3. Create a following automation:

    image1168×386 14.3 KB

It should run every 7 days for each item clearing the selected column.

Hope it helps!

If you ever need of finer precision of “When date arrives” trigger consider trying Advanced Time Triggers app that helps to schedule automations when specific item date and time arrives.
